wallet.withdraw_blocked_grace: Withdrawal temporarily blocked due to unpaid subscription.
subscription.retry.subject: Subscription Payment Retry
subscription.retry.body: Attempt {{attempt}} failed. Please fund your wallet.
subscription.grace.subject: Grace Period Started
subscription.grace.body: You have 14 days to regularize your subscription.
subscription.suspended.subject: Subscription Suspended
subscription.suspended.body: Your access has been suspended due to unpaid subscription.
subscription.payment_success.subject: Payment Successful
subscription.payment_success.body: Your subscription has been successfully renewed.
subscription.pause_requested: Your subscription will be paused at the end of the current billing cycle.
subscription.cancel_requested: Your subscription will be cancelled at the end of the current billing cycle.
